body_txt: Is there really no such thing as a bad student, only a bad teacher? The Deceptive Disciple gives the impression they are faithfully and respectfully following the teacher of whatever Way is being taught, but in reality, they have their own agenda and will end up betraying both the teacher and the Way. The "Way" can be anything — magic, religion, martial arts, business methods, governmental policy, or any combination of these things. Compare Bastard Understudy (where both student and mentor are equally evil), A Pupil of Mine Until He Turned to Evil (the pupil actually was good before), and The Paragon Always Rebels . Compare and contrast the Rule of Two . A Merlin and Nimue pairing is likely to have this character. The Treacherous Advisor and Evil Mentor are their equivalents on the other side of the Chain. The Mole may take this approach when dealing with any branch of Evil, Inc.
